purpose: Precise website-related input cases for VidGo homepage and public tool QA.
quality_rules: Try-on garment inputs must contain clothing only, with no person in the before/input image.
Use product packshots for product scene, background removal, upscale, and short video unless intentionally testing lifestyle inputs.
Use square or near-square head-and-shoulders portraits for avatar inputs.
Room redesign prompts should preserve core layout, window position, and room proportions unless testing free transform.
Pattern prompts should include seamless/tileable constraints and avoid text/logo unless explicitly testing text handling.
Translation inputs should contain readable source text and a brand-safe instruction style.

tools.input_contract: Garment-only image plus model_id. The input/before image must not contain a person.

cases.prompt_en: Camel wool coat only, front-facing ecommerce garment photo, no person, clean white background, clear sleeves and collar.
cases.prompt_zh: 駝色羊毛大衣單品，正面電商服裝照，不含人物，乾淨白底，袖子與領口清楚。
cases.expected_visual: Before is a coat alone; after is the selected model wearing the coat.

cases.prompt_en: Blue denim dress only, flat ecommerce product image, no mannequin, no person, straight front view, simple studio background.
cases.prompt_zh: 藍色丹寧洋裝單品，平面電商商品圖，無模特、無人體，正面視角，簡單棚拍背景。
cases.expected_visual: Before is a dress only; after is the model wearing the dress.

tools.input_contract: Single product image plus scene_type or custom_prompt.

cases.prompt_en: Premium bubble tea product photography for Lunar New Year gifting, red lanterns, gold foil accents, plum blossoms, warm tabletop light, no extra text.
cases.prompt_zh: 農曆新年送禮情境的珍珠奶茶商品攝影，紅燈籠、金箔點綴、梅花枝、溫暖桌面光，不要額外文字。
cases.expected_visual: The drink remains the hero product and the holiday props support the campaign.

cases.prompt_en: Luxury skincare serum on translucent glass and soft cream fabric, diffused daylight, subtle water droplets, premium ecommerce hero image, no logo changes.
cases.prompt_zh: 高級保養精華液置於透明玻璃與柔和奶油色布料上，漫射日光、細緻水珠，高級電商主圖，不改動 Logo。
cases.expected_visual: A refined product hero with stable bottle shape and readable label area.

tools.input_contract: Product photo with a removable background; output format png.

cases.prompt_en: Remove the tabletop and background from the skincare bottle, keep the cap, label edge, transparent glass edge, and soft shadow clean.
cases.prompt_zh: 移除保養瓶的桌面與背景，保留瓶蓋、標籤邊緣、透明玻璃邊與乾淨陰影。
cases.expected_visual: Transparent or white-background ecommerce cutout with no missing bottle edges.

cases.prompt_en: Cut out the bubble tea cup cleanly, preserve straw, lid rim, printed label area, cup shadow, and visible tapioca pearls.
cases.prompt_zh: 乾淨去背珍珠奶茶杯，保留吸管、杯蓋邊緣、印刷標籤區、杯身陰影與珍珠顆粒。
cases.expected_visual: Cup remains intact with no jagged straw or lid edges.

tools.input_contract: Image input plus motion_strength/model_id/style. Output should be video.

cases.prompt_en: Five-second premium skincare ad, slow rotating bottle, glossy highlights moving across glass, clean studio background, no text overlay, no label distortion.
cases.prompt_zh: 5 秒高級保養品廣告，瓶身慢速旋轉，玻璃高光滑過，乾淨棚拍背景，無文字疊加，不扭曲標籤。
cases.expected_visual: Subject stays centered while highlights/motion add product-ad energy.

cases.prompt_en: Cinematic push-in on bubble tea, ice glints, tapioca pearls gently moving, warm cafe light, social media product reel, no new text.
cases.prompt_zh: 電影感推近珍珠奶茶，冰塊反光、珍珠輕微流動、溫暖咖啡店光線，社群商品短影音，不新增文字。
cases.expected_visual: A smooth product reel with controlled motion and no warped cup.

tools.input_contract: Head-and-shoulders avatar/portrait plus script and language.

cases.script_zh: 這瓶保濕精華專為台灣悶熱天氣設計，質地清爽、不黏膩。早晚各一次，讓肌膚維持穩定透亮。今天下單享免運，30 天不滿意可退。
cases.script_en: This hydrating serum is designed for humid weather. It feels light, never sticky, and keeps skin calm and bright with morning and night use. Order today for free shipping and a 30-day satisfaction guarantee.
cases.expected_visual: Centered talking-head spokesperson with natural lip sync and product-sales tone.

cases.script_en: Stop scrolling. Our brown sugar bubble tea is made fresh every morning, with chewy pearls and roasted caramel flavor. Buy two cups today and get the second one half off.
cases.script_zh: 先別滑走。我們的黑糖珍珠奶茶每天早上現煮，珍珠 Q 彈、焦糖香濃。今天買兩杯，第二杯半價。
cases.expected_visual: Short social-sales pitch suitable for product spokesperson demos.

tools.input_contract: Room photo/sketch/floor plan plus room_type and style; preserve structure for redesign.

cases.prompt_en: Redesign this living room in Scandinavian style while preserving window placement and wall geometry; natural wood, light grey sofa, soft white curtains, daylight, realistic staging.
cases.prompt_zh: 將客廳改造成北歐風，保留窗戶位置與牆面幾何；自然木質、淺灰沙發、柔白窗簾、日光、真實家具佈置。
cases.expected_visual: Same room layout with new Scandinavian materials and furniture.

cases.prompt_en: Modern minimalist kitchen redesign, keep existing cabinet wall and island position, matte white cabinets, slim black handles, warm under-cabinet lighting, uncluttered countertop.
cases.prompt_zh: 現代極簡廚房改造，保留原有櫃體牆與中島位置，霧面白櫃、細黑把手、溫暖櫃下燈、檯面乾淨不雜亂。
cases.expected_visual: Proposal-ready kitchen render with preserved layout.

cases.prompt_en: Upscale product listing image while preserving label edges, bottle reflections, and natural shadow; no hallucinated extra text.
cases.prompt_zh: 放大商品上架圖，保留標籤邊緣、瓶身反射與自然陰影，不生成錯誤文字。
cases.expected_visual: Cleaner, larger ecommerce image with stable product details.

cases.prompt_en: Upscale real-estate interior listing image; preserve perspective, straight walls, window edges, and furniture outlines.
cases.prompt_zh: 放大房仲室內刊登圖，保留透視、直線牆面、窗框邊緣與家具輪廓。
cases.expected_visual: Higher-resolution listing image without warped architecture.

tools.input_contract: Text prompt plus style; usually 1:1 seamless output.

cases.prompt_en: Seamless premium tea packaging pattern, Alishan tea leaves, misty mountain contour lines, jade green and warm cream palette, flat vector, clean repeat, no text, no logo.
cases.prompt_zh: 高山茶包裝用無縫圖案，阿里山茶葉、薄霧山線，翡翠綠與暖奶油配色，扁平向量，乾淨重複，不要文字，不要 Logo。
cases.expected_visual: Tileable packaging pattern with no visible seams or text artifacts.

cases.prompt_en: Boutique skincare tissue-paper pattern, white camellia petals, soft glass droplets, airy spacing, pearl white and sage green, luxury minimal seamless repeat, no logo.
cases.prompt_zh: 精品保養品牌包裝襯紙圖案，白山茶花瓣、柔和玻璃水滴、留白充足，珍珠白與鼠尾草綠，高級極簡無縫重複，不要 Logo。
cases.expected_visual: Brand-safe repeat suitable for packaging tissue or backdrop.

tools.input_contract: Image with visible text plus source/target language and optional instructions.

cases.instructions_en: Keep the brand/product name unchanged. Translate promotion copy into natural Taiwan ecommerce wording. Preserve layout and discount number.
cases.instructions_zh: 保留品牌與商品名稱，將促銷文案翻成自然台灣電商語氣，維持版面與折扣數字。
cases.expected_visual: Same poster layout with readable Traditional Chinese promotion copy.

cases.instructions_en: Use concise cafe signage wording; preserve product names if they are brand names; do not add extra decorative text.
cases.instructions_zh: 使用簡潔咖啡店看板語氣；若是品牌名稱請保留；不要新增裝飾文字。
cases.expected_visual: Readable Japanese text in the original sign layout.

cases.prompt_en: Cinematic premium product-ad color grade, warm highlights, shallow-depth look, smooth commercial lighting, preserve original subject and motion, no text overlay.
cases.prompt_zh: 電影感高級商品廣告調色，溫暖高光、淺景深觀感、順滑商業燈光，保留原主體與動作，不加文字。
cases.expected_visual: Source video becomes more polished without changing core content.

cases.prompt_en: Soft watercolor social clip style, clean edges, gentle paper texture, stable faces and product details, natural camera movement.
cases.prompt_zh: 柔和水彩社群短片風格，邊緣乾淨、淡紙張紋理，人物與商品細節穩定，自然鏡頭運動。
cases.expected_visual: Stylized but stable video transform.

tools.input_contract: Video URL plus source/target language and transcript/translated script.

cases.source_script_en: Meet our new seasonal bouquet. Fresh color, soft texture, and a natural look for every special moment.
cases.translated_script_zh: 認識我們全新的季節花束。清新的色彩、柔和的質感，為每個特別時刻帶來自然優雅的氛圍。
cases.expected_visual: Dubbed product launch clip with Traditional Chinese voiceover.

cases.source_script_en: A new update is here. Faster setup, cleaner visuals, and a more polished customer experience from start to finish.
cases.translated_script_es: La nueva version ya esta aqui. Configuracion mas rapida, imagenes mas limpias y una experiencia de cliente mas cuidada de principio a fin.
cases.expected_visual: Spanish dubbed social/brand update with synced pacing.

regenerated_via: Vertex AI Imagen via /api/v1/admin/generate-demo, prompts from TEST/Test_material/prompts/*.md
